nasb.text: They gave them Shechem, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasture lands, in the hill country of Ephraim, and Gezer with its pasture lands,

esv.text: To them were given Shechem, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, Gezer with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 以色列人把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在以法蓮山地的示劍和示劍的郊野，給了他們；又把基色和基色的郊野，給了他們；

ccb.text: 以法莲山区的避难城示剑，基色、
